name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How this bot works

1. Tap /start, then Create site.
2. Answer a few questions (name, type, pages, colors, features, stack, notes).
3. Confirm the summary — I build your project and send it as a ZIP.
4. Want changes? Tap Tweak on the result and adjust any field.

Everything is reached by tapping buttons — no commands to remember.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
